summary: Documented all existing indexes across tasks.db and brain.db. Identified 10 missing composite indexes. Top priority: idx_tasks_parent_status (hierarchy hot path), idx_sessions_status_started_at (getActiveSession hot path), idx_audit_log_session_timestamp (session grading full-table scan), idx_brain_observations_content_hash_created_at (dedup hot path). One redundant index identified: idx_brain_observations_content_hash replaced by composite. All CREATE INDEX SQL provided, IF NOT EXISTS, ready for migration.
needs_followup: T032 or equivalent: write migration to apply recommended indexes
Benchmark with EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN before/after on live tasks.db

title: Soft FK Audit and Remediation Plan
summary: Identified 23 soft FK relationships across tasks.db and brain.db. 17 intra-DB candidates for hardening, 5 cross-DB (brain.db to tasks.db, cannot be native FKs), 1 intentionally soft (audit_log.task_id). Zero unexpected orphans. PRAGMA foreign_keys is OFF — must be enabled as prerequisite. Full migration SQL provided for all 17 intra-DB FKs.
needs_followup: Enable PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON in db connection setup
Implement cross-DB delete hooks in data-accessor.ts for brain.db references
Create Drizzle migration files for the 17 intra-DB FK candidates

summary: Implemented RCASD-IVTR+C pipeline stage binding: auto-assignment on task creation, forward-only transition enforcement, 33 tests pass, pipelineStage visible in cleo show output

title: Backfill Existing Tasks with AC
summary: Implemented backfill module and CLI command. 89 tasks updated with AC and verification metadata. Dry-run, rollback, and idempotency verified.
Comprehensive user guide for T056 hardened task system covering all 10 sub-tasks with CLI examples and migration guide

title: Epic Lifecycle Pipeline Enforcement
summary: Implemented epic lifecycle enforcement: min-5 AC on creation, child stage ceiling, epic stage advancement gate — all conditional on lifecycle.mode. 66 tests pass.

Generated Mermaid ERD diagrams for tasks.db (25 tables), brain.db (9 tables), and nexus.db (3 tables). All FK relationships annotated with cardinality and ON DELETE behavior. Cross-DB soft FKs documented in combined architecture overview.

title: Consolidate Schema Documentation
summary: Updated DATABASE-ERDS.md (v1.0.0 to v1.1.0) with full column descriptions for all 37 tables, T033 composite indexes, T060 pipeline_stage column, split FK legend into hard/soft sections with T030 audit references, cross-DB reference map, status registry values table, and related documents. Fixed SCHEMA-AUTHORITY.md stale schema.ts reference (now tasks-schema.ts). Fixed CLEO-BRAIN-SPECIFICATION.md missing brain.db tables and stale nexus.db path.

title: Nexus Component Validation
summary: Audited all 22 NEXUS dispatch operations. Extended dispatch handler tests from 42 to 56, adding coverage for 8 previously untested operations (discover, search, share.status, transfer.preview, reconcile, share.snapshot.export, share.snapshot.import, transfer). All 255 nexus tests pass. Zero new failures introduced.

title: Enforcement + Verification + Lifecycle Config Fields Audit
summary: Audited 22 enforcement/verification/lifecycle config fields. Found: enforcement.* has 4 LIVE and 9 VAPORWARE fields. verification.* has 3 LIVE, 1 WIRED-BUT-DEAD, 4 VAPORWARE. lifecycle.mode is fully wired to all enforcement paths. 18 dead fields identified for removal. Live fields missing from CleoConfig contract interface.

title: Session & MultiSession Config Field Audit
summary: Audited 27 session/multiSession config fields. 1 LIVE (session.enforcement as legacy fallback), 26 VAPORWARE. Critical finding: two parallel session schemas (contracts SessionConfig vs schema session block) with zero overlap. All 13 multiSession fields are vaporware — no runtime code reads any of them. enforcement.session.requiredForMutate is the actual session gate.

title: Enhance SharingStatus with git sync fields
Archive/Backup/Retention/Release Config Field Audit
summary: Audited 46 fields across archive (16), backup (11), retention (8), and release (17) config sections. Found 10 LIVE and 36 VAPORWARE. Archive and backup sections are entirely unconsumed by any engine. Retention has 1 live field (autoEndActiveAfterDays). Release has 9 live fields with several schema gaps where code reads undeclared paths. No fields removed — scale of vaporware warrants staged removal as follow-on tasks T108-A through T108-F.

title: Audit: validation + hierarchy + cancellation config fields
summary: Removed 11 vaporware validation fields from schema (strictMode, checksumEnabled, enforceAcceptance, requireDescription, maxActiveTasks, phaseValidation.*, claudedocs.*, testing.*). Removed hierarchy.autoCompleteParent and autoCompleteMode (vaporware). Removed hierarchy.requireAcceptanceCriteria phantom writes from strictness presets — now correctly writes enforcement.acceptance.mode. Annotated all 5 cancellation.* fields as deprecated (none are read by engine). Confirmed validation.enforceAcceptance was legacy; enforcement.acceptance.mode is authoritative. All 272 tests pass.
needs_followup: hierarchy.cascadeDelete in contracts/src/config.ts is wired-but-dead — remove in contract cleanup task
validation.validateDependencies and detectCircularDeps are always-on regardless of config — remove flags in follow-up if desired
cancellation.* fields could be removed from schema in follow-up after migration period

title: Remaining config sections audit: tools, testing, analyze, graphRag, cli, output, display, logging, gitCheckpoint, directories, documentation, contextAlerts, pinoLogging, defaults, contributor, storage, agentOutputs, research, project, orchestrator, contextStates, multiSession, retention, session, enforcement.files, enforcement.relates
summary: Audited ~200 config fields across 26 schema sections. Found ~157 vaporware fields, 25 live fields, 8 wired-but-dead. Removed: tools, testing, graphRag, cli, display, logging(legacy), documentation, contextStates, multiSession, project sections entirely. Trimmed: analyze, output, directories, contextAlerts, defaults, contributor, agentOutputs, research, orchestrator, retention, session, enforcement.files, enforcement.relates. All 272 tests pass. biome clean. build clean.

Implemented general-purpose withRetry<T> utility at packages/core/src/lib/retry.ts. Dependency-free, standalone — no DB coupling. Defaults: 3 attempts, 2000ms/4000ms exponential delays. Throws on final failure with RetryContext augmentation. retryableErrors option accepts RegExp[] or predicate functions. 16 tests pass, 274/274 test files green, zero regressions.

title: Agent health monitoring and heartbeat system
Implement impact prediction for changes
summary: Implemented predictImpact(change, cwd?, accessor?) in intelligence/impact.ts; wired to tasks.impact dispatch; added cleo reason impact --change <text> CLI subcommand

Verified CORE-PACKAGE-SPEC.md v3.3.0, CLEO-API.md v3.3.0, CLEOOS-VISION.md v2026.3.65 against actual codebase. Fixed: (1) cleo.ts JSDoc 10->12 domains, (2) index.ts missing AgentsAPI+IntelligenceAPI type exports, (3) index.ts missing getCleoTemplatesTildePath and updateProjectName exports, (4) CLEOOS-VISION.md operation count 219->221. All claims about namespace count (45), facade domain count (12), TasksAPI start/stop/current, SessionsAPI startTask, sections 15.7/15.8 in CORE-PACKAGE-SPEC, sections 15.8/15.9 in CLEO-API verified correct. Build passes, biome clean.

Added optional getTranscript to AdapterHookProvider, implemented in ClaudeCodeHookProvider reading ~/.claude/projects/ JSONL, wired into session-end handler gated on brain.autoCapture, added extractFromTranscript for brain ingestion

title: Session summarization: prompt injection + structured response
summary: Added SessionSummaryInput to contracts, buildSummarizationPrompt() and ingestStructuredSummary() to session-memory.ts, wired dual-mode into sessionEnd() engine. memoryPrompt returned when brain.summarization.enabled. Structured ingest fires when sessionSummary passed in params. Build clean, zero new test failures.

Rewrote CLEO-BRAIN-SPECIFICATION.md v1.3.0→v2.0.0 to reflect shipped T134 automation: lifecycle hooks, BrainConfig contract, local embedding (all-MiniLM-L6-v2), memory bridge auto-refresh, dual-mode session summarization, cross-provider transcript extraction. Removed stale phased roadmap and JSON schema appendices.

Enhanced observeBrain() to auto-link new observations to the currently focused task via brain_memory_links when sourceSessionId is present. Uses fire-and-forget pattern so linking never blocks the observation return.
acceptance: observeBrain() auto-creates brain_memory_links when session has focused task
Link connects observation to task via produced_by linkType

title: Embedding backfill with progress reporting
summary: Enhanced populateEmbeddings() with onProgress callback + errors field. Added --embeddings flag to cleo backfill. Fixed pre-existing build breakage from T138 by adding BrainConfig to contracts.

title: Migrate CLEO hook types.ts to CAAMP 16-event canonical taxonomy
summary: Migrated 8 on-prefix provider events to CAAMP 1.9.1 canonical taxonomy (16 events). Updated handler registrations, dispatch sites, payload types, schemas, adapter maps. Backward compat via LEGACY_EVENT_MAP auto-remapping. All quality gates pass.

New handlers: agent-hooks.ts (SubagentStart/Stop), context-hooks.ts (PreCompact/PostCompact), Notification handler in mcp-hooks.ts. All config-gated via brain.autoCapture. index.ts updated. 277 tests pass.

29 E2E tests in hook-automation-e2e.test.ts covering SessionStart/End, PreToolUse/PostToolUse, PromptSubmit (mutation filter), ResponseComplete, SubagentStart/Stop, PreCompact/PostCompact, Notification, config gating, and dedup.

Implemented global-salt subsystem: atomic first-run generation (tmp+chmod+rename), in-process memoization, size/permission validation on POSIX, cross-platform Windows compat. Exports GLOBAL_SALT_FILENAME, GLOBAL_SALT_SIZE, getGlobalSaltPath, getGlobalSalt, validateGlobalSalt, __clearGlobalSaltCache. 16 tests pass, no new failures introduced.

Refactored signaldock-sqlite.ts to global-tier only per ADR-037/spec §3.2. New exports: GLOBAL_SIGNALDOCK_DB_FILENAME, GLOBAL_SIGNALDOCK_SCHEMA_VERSION, getGlobalSignaldockDbPath, ensureGlobalSignaldockDb, checkGlobalSignaldockDbHealth, getGlobalSignaldockNativeDb, _resetGlobalSignaldockDb_TESTING_ONLY. Removed project-local DDL (conversations, messages, delivery_jobs, dead_letters, attachments, message_pins, attachment_versions, attachment_approvals, attachment_contributors). Consolidated 3 incremental ALTER TABLE migrations into single initial migration. Added requires_reauth column. Kept deprecated aliases getSignaldockDbPath/ensureSignaldockDb/checkSignaldockDbHealth that throw when called with cwd arg. internal.ts updated surgically. 25 new tests pass (TC-020 through TC-027 + extras). 32 broken callers documented for T355/T358.
